name: Minecraft: Forge
author: ops@refx.example
description: Minecraft Forge mod-loader server. The classic modding platform for large modpacks (CurseForge / FTB style).

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
MC_VER="${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
LOADER="${LOADER_VERSION}"
# TODO(impl): when LOADER_VERSION is 'latest'/'recommended', resolve the build
# from the Forge promotions manifest. The recommended build is not always
# present for every Minecraft version; fall back to the latest in that case.
if [ "$LOADER" = "latest" ] || [ "$LOADER" = "recommended" ]; then
  PROMOS=$(curl -fsSL https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/promotions_slim.json)
  LOADER=$(echo "$PROMOS" | jq -r --arg k "${MC_VER}-recommended" '.promos[$k] // empty')
  if [ -z "$LOADER" ]; then
    LOADER=$(echo "$PROMOS" | jq -r --arg k "${MC_VER}-latest" '.promos[$k] // empty')
  fi
  if [ -z "$LOADER" ]; then echo "No Forge build found for Minecraft ${MC_VER}" >&2; exit 1; fi
fi
FULL="${MC_VER}-${LOADER}"
echo "Installing Forge ${FULL}"
curl -fsSL -o forge-installer.jar "https://maven.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/${FULL}/forge-${FULL}-installer.jar"
java -jar forge-installer.jar --installServer
rm -f forge-installer.jar forge-installer.jar.log
# Modern Forge (1.17+) generates run.sh + user_jvm_args.txt +
# libraries/.../unix_args.txt instead of a runnable server jar; the startup
# command launches via those arg files. Ensure user_jvm_args.txt exists.
if [ ! -f user_jvm_args.txt ]; then
  echo '# Xmx/Xms are supplied on the command line by the panel' > user_jvm_args.txt
fi
# TODO(impl): legacy Forge (<=1.16) produces a runnable forge-*-universal/
# server jar and no unix_args.txt; that path would need a different startup
# command. Modern Forge only for now.
if [ "${EULA}" = "true" ]; then echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt; fi
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.description: Unused for modern Forge (the server launches via generated arg files); kept for compatibility.
The Minecraft version to install Forge for (e.g. 1.21.1).
The Forge build version. Use 'recommended' (or 'latest') to auto-resolve from the Forge promotions manifest.
Maximum Java heap size in megabytes (-Xmx).
You must accept the Mojang EULA to run a server.
